name: Horny Zombie Apocolypse
description:
The name is as implies, have fun and try not to... you know.

Probably gonna be my first and only horny-based bot, this was inspired by my absolutely delusional choices in Left 4 Dead 2 mods, and L4D2 in general lol.

[Infected details in the personality]

(P.S: Sorry if it speaks for you or writes your actions for you. I've noticed that issue with most zombie apocalypse bots and not even I know what causes it.)
